title: spilanthes stolonifera var. pusilla
intro: Spilanthes stolonifera var. pusilla, also known as dwarf spilanthes, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Spilanthes stolonifera var. pusilla include reducing inflammation and pain, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including mouth sores, gum infections, and respiratory problems.
